item.author: bhendi

item.title: json rpc和grpc可以协同工作吗？ | Can json rpc and grpc work together?
item.description:
清洁代码工作室

发表于 1 月 5 日

是的，JSON-RPC 和 gRPC 可以一起工作。 但是，它们使用不同的编码方案和通信方式。

一起使用 JSON-RPC 和 gRPC 的一种方法是让 JSON-RPC 服务器充当 gRPC 服务器的客户端，反之亦然。 例如，您可以有一个将请求转发到 gRPC 服务器的 JSON-RPC 服务器，或者一个调用 JSON-RPC 服务器上的方法的 gRPC 服务器。

另一种同时使用 JSON-RPC 和 gRPC 的方法是使用在两种协议之间进行转换的网桥或网关。 这允许使用不同协议的客户端和服务器相互通信。

也可以通过在同一服务器或客户端中实现这两种协议来同时使用 JSON-RPC 和 gRPC。 这允许服务器或客户端支持这两种协议，并允许使用任一协议的客户端访问服务器的方法。

清洁代码工作室

丹尼尔桑托斯 - 22 年 12 月 12 日

一旦暂停，cleancodestudio 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

解除暂停后，cleancodestudio 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，cleancodestudio 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 cleancodestudio 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 cleancodestudio：

降低 cleancodestudio 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 cleancodestudio 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Clean Code Studio

Posted on Jan 5

Yes, it is possible for JSON-RPC and gRPC to work together. JSON-RPC and gRPC are both remote procedure call (RPC) protocols that allow a client to call methods on a server over a network. However, they use different encoding schemes and communication styles.

One way to use JSON-RPC and gRPC together is to have a JSON-RPC server act as a client to a gRPC server, or vice versa. For example, you could have a JSON-RPC server that forwards requests to a gRPC server, or a gRPC server that calls methods on a JSON-RPC server.

Another way to use JSON-RPC and gRPC together is to use a bridge or gateway that translates between the two protocols. This allows clients and servers that use different protocols to communicate with each other.

It is also possible to use JSON-RPC and gRPC together by implementing both protocols in the same server or client. This allows the server or client to support both protocols, and allows clients using either protocol to access the server's methods.

Clean Code Studio

Daniel Santos - Dec 12 '22

Aakhil Karthikkeyan - Nov 29 '22

Once suspended, cleancodestudio will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, cleancodestudio will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by cleancodestudio will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If cleancodestudio is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag cleancodestudio:

Make all posts by cleancodestudio less visible

cleancodestudio consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging cleancodestudio will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: cleancodestudio

item.title: 我的数据结构学习策略 | My Strategy for Learning Data Structures
item.description:
辛吉玛特99

发表于 1 月 5 日

我刚刚开始学习数据结构的旅程，所以自然而然地我问聊天 GPT 最好的学习策略，其中一种方法是从头开始实现给定的数据结构。 现在这听起来令人生畏...

然而，这是个好主意！ 我肯定会把它添加到我的学习策略中。 所以这是我到目前为止所拥有的。

首先，我必须选择一种数据结构来学习，然后我将遵循以下步骤，直到我对自己理解和使用数据结构的能力充满信心：

我将花一些时间首先收集有关数据结构的信息。

我的研究将集中在以下方面：

  • 如何从结构中读取和写入的基础知识
  • 它是怎么来的
  • 它解决了哪些问题

是的，我说的是 Java，一种我什至还不知道的语言。 我为什么要这样做？ 有几个原因：

  1. 主要原因是为了找到创建这个结构所需的所有语法，我需要完全理解它是如何工作的。
  2. 我想学习 Java，我记得前一段时间问 ChatGPT 学习 Java 的最佳方法，它给我的答案之一是用语言实现数据结构。

这一步只有在我对数据结构有深刻理解的情况下才有可能。 我将通过首先学习构建结构所需的所有必要的低级概念来开发它，例如它如何存储在内存中以及用于构建它的其他数据结构。 这些是步骤：

  • 学习底层概念
  • 用伪代码编写数据结构
  • 将伪代码转换为 Java（可能还有 Javascript 只是为了好玩）

这将是最困难的一步，可能需要几天时间，但我相信这对于学习过程是必要的。

我相信这一步是至关重要的，因为它将帮助我学习如何实际使用数据结构来解决问题。 这将连接所有的点并对齐所有的星星，以便我理解数据结构。


如果你没有注意到这篇文章中的所有图片都是由 AI 生成的。

一旦我完成了所有这些步骤，我相信我可以开始使用数据结构来解决更难的 Leetcode 问题（甚至可能是我对它的实现 ¯_(ツ)_/¯）。

永恒的开发帖子...

我多年前就希望知道的 Git 概念

开发人员使用最多的技术不是 Javascript。

它不是 Python 或 HTML。

它甚至很少在面试中被提及或被列为工作的先决条件。

当然，我说的是 Git 和版本控制。

一旦暂停，singhimat99 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被取消。

解除暂停后，singhimat99 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，singhimat99 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 singhimat99 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 singhimat99 的方法：

降低 singhimat99 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 singhimat99 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

singhimat99

Posted on Jan 5

I have just started my journey in learning Data Structures so naturally I ask chat GPT the best strategy for learning and one of the methods was to implement the given data structure from scratch. Now that sounds daunting...

However, this is a great idea! I am definitely going to add it into my learning strategy. So heres what I have so far.

First I have to pick a data structures to study then I will follow these steps until I feel confident in my ability to understand and use the data structure:

1. Research Research Research.

I will spend some time first gathering information on the data structure.

My research will be focused on the following:

  • basics of how to read and write from the structure
  • how it came about
  • which problems it solves

2. Next I will try to implement it on my own in Java.

Yes, I said Java, a language I do not even know yet. Why would I do this? There is a couple reasons:

  1. The main reason is that in order to find all of the syntax necessary to create this structure I will need to fully understand how it works.
  2. I want to learn Java, I remember asking ChatGPT a while ago the best way to learn Java and one of the answers it gave me was to implement data structures in the language.

This step is only possible if I have a deep understanding of the data structure. I will develop this by first learning all of the necessary lower level concepts that go into building the structure like how it is stored in memory and what other data structures are used to build it. These are the steps:

  • Learn the low level concepts
  • Write the data structure in pseudocode
  • convert the pseudocode into Java (and possibly Javascript just for fun)

This is going to be the hardest step and will likely take a couple of days but I believe it's necessary for the learning process.

3. Finally I will solve Leetcode easy questions with my own implementation of the data structure.

I believe this step is crucial because it will help me learn how to actually use the data structure to solve a problem. This will connect all of the dots and align all of the stars for me to understand the data structure.


In case you haven't noticed all of the pictures in this post have been generated by AI.

Once I have done all of these steps I believe I can start tackling harder Leetcode questions using the data structure (and maybe even my implementation of it ¯_(ツ)_/¯).

Timeless DEV post...

Git Concepts I Wish I Knew Years Ago

The most used technology by developers is not Javascript.

It's not Python or HTML.

It hardly even gets mentioned in interviews or listed as a pre-requisite for jobs.

I'm talking about Git and version control of course.

Lakin Mohapatra - Dec 28 '22

Krzysztof Koziarski - Dec 28 '22

Shashwat Nautiyal - Jan 1

Once suspended, singhimat99 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, singhimat99 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by singhimat99 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If singhimat99 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag singhimat99:

Make all posts by singhimat99 less visible

singhimat99 consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging singhimat99 will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: singhimat99

item.title: Python 中的圆形可视化（Circos Plot、Chord Diagram） | Circular visualization in Python (Circos Plot, Chord Diagram)
item.description:
循环数据可视化通常用于可视化相互关系，例如数据之间的网络和流。 下图称为Chord Diagram ，它可以将数据之间的相互关系以简单而美观的方式可视化。

在生物信息学领域，循环数据可视化工具（Perl模块） Circos被广泛用于可视化基因组信息和基因网络，我们经常看到数值、统计和各种数据相互关系的循环可视化。

在 R 语言中， circlize是一个著名的圆形可视化包，被许多用户使用。 另一方面，Python中还没有像circlize一样功能丰富、被用户广泛使用的圆形可视化包。 因此，我开发了pyCirclize ，目的是使类似 circlize 的可视化在 Python 中可用。

例如，用户可以执行以下循环数据可视化。

永恒的开发帖子...

我多年前就希望知道的 Git 概念

开发人员使用最多的技术不是 Javascript。

它不是 Python 或 HTML。

它甚至很少在面试中被提及或被列为工作的先决条件。

当然，我说的是 Git 和版本控制。

一旦被暂停，moshi4 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，moshi4 将可以再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，moshi4 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 moshi4 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 moshi4 的方法：

降低 moshi4 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 moshi4 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Circular data visualization is often used to visualize interrelationships such as networks and flows between data. The following diagram is called a Chord Diagram, which can visualize the interrelationships of data in a simple and beautiful way.

In the bioinformatics field, Circos, a circular data visualization tool (Perl module) is widely used to visualize genome information and gene networks, and we often see circular visualizations of numerical values, statistics, and interrelationships of various data.

In R language, circlize is a well-known circular visualization package that is used by many users. Circlize provides many high-level and low-level APIs for circular visualization, and users can write code for circular visualization in a flexible way.
On the other hand, there is still no circular visualization package in Python that is as feature-rich and widely used by users as circlize. Therefore, I developed pyCirclize for the purpose of making circlize-like visualization available in Python.

pyCirclize (GitHub / Document) enables easy and flexible execution of circular data visualizations such as Chord Diagram and Circos from the Python API. As an example, user can perform the following circular data visualization.

Timeless DEV post...

Git Concepts I Wish I Knew Years Ago

The most used technology by developers is not Javascript.

It's not Python or HTML.

It hardly even gets mentioned in interviews or listed as a pre-requisite for jobs.

I'm talking about Git and version control of course.

Maximiliano Burgos - Dec 11 '22

Helitha Rupasinghe - Jan 1

Once suspended, moshi4 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, moshi4 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by moshi4 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If moshi4 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Make all posts by moshi4 less visible

Report other inappropriate conduct
